source_names: 交通部鐵道局各計畫進度及計畫辦理情形
candidate_handling_policy: These records are retained as candidates only. They must not be merged into active GeoJSON until source detail pages, owner/contractor fields, schedule fields, deduplication keys, and GeoJSON geometry are checked against official public sources.

candidates.name: 桃園鐵路地下化計畫
candidates.owner: 交通部鐵道局、桃園市政府相關機關
candidates.address: 新北市、桃園市臺鐵縱貫線沿線
candidates.dedupe_key: 桃園鐵路地下化計畫|交通部鐵道局|新北桃園縱貫線
candidates.candidate_reason: Public progress information indicates an active railway construction plan, but contractor, source detail URL, verified budget, and route geometry still require official-source completion.

candidates.name: 臺鐵平鎮臨時站計畫
candidates.owner: 交通部鐵道局、臺灣鐵路公司、桃園市政府相關機關
candidates.address: 桃園市平鎮區環南路與新富一街周邊
candidates.dedupe_key: 臺鐵平鎮臨時站計畫|交通部鐵道局|平鎮區
candidates.candidate_reason: Candidate only because completion/opening timing must be rechecked before any active inclusion; if already opened more than one month, it should go to history rather than active.

candidates.name: 北宜鐵路提速工程計畫

candidates.candidate_reason: Planning/evaluation-stage railway candidate. Keep outside active until official planning status, route scope, and public source detail page are normalized.

candidates.contractor: 尚未進入可列 active 的施工承攬資料

next_actions: Fetch official project detail pages or datasets for each railway candidate.
Complete contractor, budget, schedule, and route geometry before any active import.
Move completed or no-longer-active items to history instead of active.
